folio.label: 201v
folio.l: Ministre of detú , for if thow speke of moo
Thow hest , for thy power is ful naked
Do wey thyn boldenesse , seide Almachius tho
And do sacrifise to oure goddes , er æè go
I recche nat what wrong , æ æow me profre
For I can suffre it , as a Philosophre
¢ But thilke wronges , may I nat endure

note.notetxt: 491Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: That æè spekest , of oure goddes heere q¶ he
Cecile answerde , o nyce creature
Thow seidest no word , syn æè spake to me
That I ne knew there witú , thy nycetee
And that æè were , in euäy maner wyse
A lewed officere , a veyn Iustise
¢ There lakketú no thyng , to thyne vttere eyen

note.notetxt: 498 Indication in left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.Est

folio.l: That æè nart blynd , for æing æ we sen alle
That is a ston , æat men moun wel espien
That ilke a ston , a god æè wolt it calle
I rede the , lat thyn hond , vp on it falle
And taste it wel , & ston æè shalt it fynde
Syn æ æè seest nat , w thyne eyen blynde
¢ It is a shame , that the peeple shal

note.notetxt: 505Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: So scornen the , and laugúe at thyn folie
For comunly , men woot it wel ouä al
That mygúty god is , in his heuenes hye
And theise ymages , wel æè maist espie
To the , ne to he~ self , moun nat profite
For in effect , they be nat wortú a myte
¢ Theise and swicú othere , seide she

note.notetxt: 512Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: And he wex wrotú , & bad men shulde hire lede
Hoom til hire hous , and in hire hous q¶ he
Brenne hire , rigút in a bathe , w flambes rede
And as he bad , rigút so was don the dede
For in a bathe , they gonne hire faste shetten
And nygút and day , gret fyr they vnder betten
¢ The longe nygút , and eke a day also

note.notetxt: 519Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: For al the fyr , and eke the bathes hete
She sat al cold , and feled no woo
It made hire nat , a drope for to swete
But in that batú , hire lif she muste lete
For he Almachius , w a ful wykke entente
To slen hire in the batú , his sonde sente
¢ Thre strokes in the nekke , he smot hire tho

note.notetxt: 526Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP
